+++ head/security/lynis/Makefile	Wed May  7 19:27:28 2014	(r353198)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	lynis
-PORTVERSION=	1.3.5
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.5.0
 CATEGORIES=	security
 MASTER_SITES=	http://cisofy.com/files/
 
@@ -14,7 +13,7 @@ LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
-PORTDOCS=	INSTALL FAQ LICENSE README
+PORTDOCS=	FAQ LICENSE README
 
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/tINCLUDE_TARGETS/ s|".*"|"${DATADIR}/include"|; \
